interfaces.connector: 2x6 2.54 mm shrouded keyed header + asymmetric printed key post
interfaces.reverseInsertionProtection: shrouded header + asymmetric key post; rotated/offset insertion mechanically blocked
interfaces.hotPlugRationale: no inrush limiting or sequencing designed/tested; see DEC-004
interfaces.esdProtection: clamp array on SDA/SCL/INT (part selection estimated)
interfaces.exposure: recessed pocket behind slide cover; contacts not fingertip-accessible per design intent (requires_validation)

interfaces.description: 8.5-inch self-contained LCD writing tablet docks into printed pocket; retained by lip + service panel; no electrical connection in v0.1
paper/plastic lesson sheet slides over backlit diffuser; teacher-replaceable without tools
bottom service panel, 6x M3 thread-forming screws into printed bosses; tool required (child-resistant intent, requires_validation)
UART0 (GPIO20/21) + BOOT-strap access on internal service header; inside enclosure, not user-accessible
